summary: Preoperative fasting is not strictly required in animal models of surgical training; current best practice favors minimizing or eliminating fasts based on ERAS principles that prioritize patient stability through timely nutrition. This approach reduces risks like hypoglycemia and promotes metabolic balance during post-operative recovery.
